ranked_movies.title: Clue
ranked_movies.reason: Most frequently recommended as the top fun murder mystery, mentioned multiple times with enthusiastic agreement across comments.

ranked_movies.title: Fight Club
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended for its shocking, mind-bending twist ending that recontextualizes the entire film.

ranked_movies.title: The Sixth Sense
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently suggested as a prime example of a film with an unforgettable, shocking ending.

ranked_movies.title: The Usual Suspects
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited alongside The Sixth Sense as a classic film with a legendary twist ending.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as one of the few modern horror films that genuinely disturbed and scared adult viewers.

ranked_movies.title: The Blues Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Top recommendation for 80s comedies, praised for its humor and style.

ranked_movies.title: Trading Places
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended alongside The Blues Brothers as a quintessential 80s comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Oldboy
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a film with a shocking, unforgettable ending that leaves viewers reeling.

ranked_movies.title: JFK
ranked_movies.reason: Described as the perfect film for conspiracy theory enthusiasts, with the conspiracy as the main plot.

ranked_movies.title: Enemy of the State
ranked_movies.reason: Multiple recommendations for its engaging conspiracy-driven narrative.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Lebowski
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a ultimate comfort movie for bad days, providing a warm blanket-like experience.

ranked_movies.title: Office Space
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a go-to comfort movie that helps shut the brain off after a terrible day.

ranked_movies.title: Knives Out
ranked_movies.reason: Top modern recommendation for fun murder mysteries that don't take themselves too seriously.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as one of the few horror films that genuinely scared adult viewers on first watch.

ranked_movies.title: The Prestige
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its mind-bending narrative and shocking twists.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed in the context of Kubrick's mastery and mentioned as a horror classic.

ranked_movies.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a classic 80s comedy that holds up well for modern audiences.

ranked_movies.title: The Manchurian Candidate
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as an excellent conspiracy theory film, with both original and remake versions praised.

ranked_movies.title: Barbarian
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a recent horror film that effectively scared viewers, particularly in its middle section.

ranked_movies.title: The Empty Man
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as an underappreciated horror film that delivers genuine scares.
